title: Template Injection via Microsoft Office
description: Detects Office applications loading remote templates, a technique to deliver malicious macros.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Parent Process Name' like '*\\WINWORD.EXE' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\EXCEL.EXE' or 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\POWERPNT.EXE') and 'Command Line' like '*http*'))
